style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow, drifting mist particles that swirl in unnatural spirals around Gyarados's body, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces; cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses through its translucent skin, casting eerie elongated shadows that bend and stretch like liquid; the lighting mood is a haunting pale lavender with deep indigo undertones, creating an atmosphere of spectral stillness; Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
